heading: Prime Minister’s Award for Excellence in Public Administration (2017-2018)
section: Prime Minister’s Award for Excellence in Public Administration (2017-2018)
text:
# Prime Minister’s Award for Excellence in Public Administration (2017-2018)

Year: 2018 | Date: 21/04/2018
PM Award 2018
**Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana** ” was announced by the Government of India on 13th January 2016 which is rolling out from June 2016 with an objective to let farmers pay a very low premium to insure their crops. Farmers will have to pay a premium of only 1.5% for paddy, Brinjal, Cauliflower, Tomato, Watermelon & 3.5% for Potato at Gomati District during 2016-17.
Total No’s of Farmers in the District:50530
Total coverage of insured farmers: 4541
Nos. of non-loanee farmer: 3851
Nos. of Laonee Farmer: 690
Percentage of insured Non-loanee farmers out of the total insured farmers: 84.8
Name of the Awardees –

1. Dr Milind Ramteke, IAS, District Magistrate & Collector, West Tripura
2. Sri Arun Bhattacherjee, DD Agriculture, West Tripura District

## Award Type : Gold

### Award By:

Sri Narendra Modi, Hon’ble Prime Minister of India

### Winner Team Name:

District Administration, West Tripura District
**Project Name:** Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana under West Tripura District
**Location:** West Tripura District
